texto: ...capitalism is too important and complex a subject to be left to economists. Achieving a critical comprehension of it requires perspectives beyond those characteristic of modern economics. That is why this is a history not of economic ideas, but of ideas beyond the capitalist economy.
explicacao: Citação de Jerry Z. Muller sobre temas ligados a sucesso. “...capitalism is too important and complex a subject to be left to economists. Achieving a critic…” articula sucesso, capitalism, capitalist em registro de sucesso, com relevância para contextos como capitalist e economy.

seo.titleSeo: "...capitalism is too important and complex a subject…" — Jerry Z. Muller | Metamensagem
seo.descriptionSeo: Citação de Jerry Z. Muller sobre temas ligados a sucesso. “...capitalism is too important and complex a subject to be left to economists. Achieving a critic…”…

frase_original: ...capitalism is too important and complex a subject to be left to economists. Achieving a critical comprehension of it requires perspectives beyond those characteristic of modern economics. That is why this is a history not of economic ideas, but of ideas beyond the capitalist economy.
